summary: Built and deployed a classroom booking system serving five campuses and 100+ faculty. Configured secure backend infrastructure maintaining zero downtime since launch. Also configured and restored 1,000+ Chromebooks for student device distribution.
Engineered a data processing pipeline to automate mail-list segmentation for 10,000+ users.  Developed a desktop application to consolidate Qualtrics survey data.
Assembled a Midjourney prompt library and spearheaded the adoption of AI-assisted design workflows. Created 30+ custom postcards and branded 100+ templates and landing pages.
